stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, second baseman Michael Massey to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Jonny DeLuca to 3rd. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, pitcher Kevin Kelly to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Jac Caglianone to 3rd. Kameron Misner out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.
